name: wmc-marp-template
description: Woodmark Consulting corporate Marp slide template with a branded theme and build-time Mermaid diagram rendering.

scripts.build:screenshots: mkdir -p assets && marp --config marp.config.mjs decks/starter.md --images png -o decks/rendered/starter.png && cp decks/rendered/starter.001.png assets/cover.png && cp decks/rendered/starter.002.png assets/banner.png && cp decks/rendered/starter.003.png assets/steps.png && cp decks/rendered/starter.004.png assets/default-content.png && cp decks/rendered/starter.005.png assets/mermaid.png && cp decks/rendered/starter.006.png assets/statement.png
scripts.build:rendered: mkdir -p decks/rendered && for d in starter layout-test; do for ext in pdf html; do marp --config marp.config.mjs decks/$d.md -o decks/rendered/$d.$ext; done; done
